event: Horologium of the Night (Digital Art Collage)
description: A digital art collage in an ornate gold frame featuring multiple crescent moon faces with feminine features, colorful roses in blue, green, and pink, and a translucent feminine figure amid swirling purple and pink clouds. A small figure with a heart symbol stands near a lamppost at the upper left. The overall palette is rich with purples, pinks, blues, and golds. The style blends Art Nouveau elements with modern digital collage techniques. Text reading 'Agnes von Angelis' appears at the top.
